Cist..Generalities: This remedy is an antipsoric, a deep-acting remedy. It runs very close to Calcarea, but is milder in its action. It has the same exhaustion from exertion, dyspnoea, sweating and coldness that we find in Calcarea.
Cist..Clinical: The glands inflame, become swollen and suppurate. It causes cries and cures old ulcers. It has a scrofulous constitution. It is useful in chronic diarrhea, with enlarged glands, even in those who are flabby, sickly and pallid and who cannot go upstairs without losing, their breath.
Cist..Ear: Shooting, stitching, tearing pains in inflamed parts. Red discharges from the ear date back to eruptive diseases.
Cist..Face: This remedy has cured lupus on the face. Caries of the lower jaw. Open, bleeding cancer on the lower lip. Lupus exedens. Pain in all the joints of the face.
Cist..Throat: The same cold feeling is described in the throat as in the nose-smarting and coldness. Mouth and throat full of mucus. The throat feels rough, as if full of sand. Dry spots in the throat. The throat looks glossy, shining as if vanished, in old atrophic catarrhs.
Cist..Generalities, heat: Hot air feels good everywhere. In old cases there is trouble with scrofulous glands, which are enlarged, and the patient wants the heat; goes to the register and turns the heat on, wants to feel the heat in the nose, throat and lungs.
Cist..Ear, discharges: Red discharges from the ear date back to eruptive diseases.
Cist..Clinical, inflammation: The glands inflame, become swollen and suppurate.
Cist..Clinical, swelling: The glands inflame, become swollen and suppurate. It causes cries and cures old ulcers. It has a scrofulous constitution.
Cist..External throat: Scrofula; swelling and suppuration of the glands of the neck.
It cures old, deep-seated, eating ulcers about the ankle and shin, with copious acrid discharge, formication and swollen glands, aggravation from bathing, extreme sensitiveness to the open air, only comfortable when very warm.
Cist..Clinical, swelling, glands: The glands of the neck are enlarged in lines, like knotted rope, as in Hodgkins disease.
Cist..Throat, dryness: Hawking of gum-like mucus, especially in the morning, fauces inflamed and dry. Suppuration of the glands of the throat.
Cist..Face, inflammation: Sharp shooting, intolerable itching and thick crusts, with burning on right zygoma.
Cist..Generalities, cold: Frontal headache with coldness. In a warm room the perspiration comes out, and it is cold, and the more he sweats the colder he gets.
Cist..External throat, swelling: Scrofula; swelling and suppuration of the glands of the neck.
Cist..External throat, swelling, cervical glan: The glands of the neck are enlarged in lines, like knotted rope, as in Hodgkins disease.
Cist..Generalities, heat, vital, lack of: They do not feel cold to touch, but they are cold subjectively, chilly.
Cist..External throat, glands: Suppuration of the glands of the throat. The glands of the neck are enlarged in lines, like knotted rope, as in Hodgkins disease.
Cist..External throat, glands, cervical: The glands of the neck were large and hard, the parotids especially.
Cist..Generalities, heat, vital: Patients going into tuberculosis have that desire for beat; chilly persons, They do not feel cold to touch, but they are cold subjectively, chilly.
Cist..Face, parotid glands: The parotid gland is so much enlarged that it pushes the head to one side.
Cist..Face, inflammation, parotid gland: The glands of the neck were large and hard, the parotids especially; she had foetid otorrhoea; her eyes were inflamed and suppurating.
Cist..Back: Eruption on the back like shingles. Scrofulous ulcer on the back. Burning, bruised pain in the coccyx, worse from touch.
Cist..Back, pain: Burning, bruised pain in the coccyx, worse from touch.
Cist..Chest: The chest fills up with mucus and he feels relieved after expectoration, but after he empties the chest it feels raw. Left mamma inflamed, suppurating, with a feeling of fullness in the chest.
Cist..Extremities: Tetter on the hands; blisters oozing after scratching. Diseases of the nails. Hard, thickened places on the hands of workmen, with deep cracks.
Cist..Extremities, coldness: It has the same exhaustion from exertion, dyspnoea, sweating and coldness that we find in Calcarea.
